text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In a sudden turn of events,<n>Umamusume from
around the world<n>will be arriving for an
impromptu<n>cultural exchange festival.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: While I'm decorating the campus...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The hallway decorations seem to be<n>coming
along nicely. I suppose this<n>display case is the
one dedicated to<n>the academy's history.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It features a variety of memorabilia<n>lent to us by
the director. I ask that<n>everyone here handles it
with care.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Eeek!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Is everything okay? Are you hurt?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, I'm okay, but... I just left a<n>dent in the
director's prized wooden<n>sculpture!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmm... It's a sculpture of an<n>Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'll take responsibility for this.<n>Continue with your
tasks—I'll go and<n>tell the director.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm, looking at these dimensions, a<n>piste should
be within reason. This<n>should allow us to hold
proper duels.

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Bravo! If it will instill great excitement,<n>then
absolutely!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
There you are, Director Akikawa. And<n>you too,
President.

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Why yes! We were just in<n>discussions about the
fencing show,<n>one of the events scheduled for
the<n>cultural exchange festival!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
My apologies for interrupting, but I<n>have
something to tell you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Your wooden sculpture has been<n>damaged due
to my poor leadership. I<n>am truly sorry.

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text: What a shame! A true shame, indeed!<n>However...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
All things are transient. Perhaps its<n>time had
come...

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
As such, a suggestion! Assume the<n>role of
Rudolf's training partner! If you<n>emerge
victorious, then I shall<n>overlook this incident!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Would you do me the honor, Air<n>Groove? I cannot
find anyone to spar<n>with me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ah, a fencing partner? If you would<n>have me as
your partner, then I would<n>be delighted to.

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Excellent! Then, let us begin!<n>Rassemblez,
saluez!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Come, and show me what you're<n>made of. May
the talents of your<n>blade bloom forth with pride!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This may be a mere mock duel, but as<n>the proud
Empress, I know not of<n>defeat!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After a fierce exchange of offensive<n>and
defensive blows, Air Groove<n>racks up enough
points and wins!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Your defense was<n>impenetrable. The
Empress of our fair<n>academy is as swift as a
bolt of<n>lightning.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Your humility speaks volumes. I<n>would have
stood no chance if you<n>dueled in earnest.

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
A decisive win! I expected no less of<n>you, Air
Groove. Very well, I shall<n>overlook the sculpture
incident!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After a fierce exchange of offensive<n>and
defensive blows, Symboli Rudolf<n>racks up
enough points and wins!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Your skills were far superior to mine. I<n>
concede—you are worthy to be<n>heralded as the
Emperor.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In reality, the difference was paper<n>thin. I became
quite stubborn by the<n>end of our match.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't convinced I could win with<n>the ease of
an emperor against your<n>prowess.

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
A close duel! Also, an excellent and<n>rare one! I
shall acknowledge your<n>skills and overlook the
sculpture<n>incident!

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
And now, a question! What kind of<n>wood was the
sculpture carved from?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Perhaps... oak?

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Correct! And that Umamusume<n>sculpture...

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Was modeled on the illustrious,<n>extremely
popular Queen who<n>conquered the Japanese
Oaks.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: The Queen...

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I implore you to continue your efforts.<n>May they
truly befit that of royalty!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I am sincerely grateful for the<n>immense leniency
you have shown.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Now, if you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove leaves with a bow, swiftly<n>returning
to oversee the event<n>preparations.
